---
title: "\'Real Childhood- the Teens, A\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'Real Childhood- the Teens, A\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1893
**Genre:** Non-fiction, reminiscences
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 3: 9 (January 1893) 15-21

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
